label: Menu
summary: A dropdown menu bar: nested list submenus open on hover and focus; the enhancer adds keyboard and tap.
era: The "DHTML dropdown menu" cut-and-pasted from a free-scripts site onto every portal of 2000.

classes.name: rs-menu
classes.role: menu bar nav; nested ul submenus open on hover/focus-within

a11y: Disclosure navigation, not role="menu": submenu triggers are <button aria-expanded aria-controls>, submenus are plain lists of links. The enhancer adds the full keyboard map.
